body:
A Socialist Gets Elected, and A Vacancy on The Supreme Court No Images? [Click here](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-e-jjoirit-kujkulhluu-f/) [](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jjoirit-kujkulhluu-r/) [](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jjoirit-kujkulhluu-y/)
### [A Socialist Gets Elected, and A Vacancy on The Supreme Court](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jjoirit-kujkulhluu-j/)
There were two things which happened last week - one of them was a pretty big deal, and the other was a really big deal. Click below to read more.

On a separate note, I hope you and your family have a wonderful Independence Day. God Bless America! [Read this entry >>](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jjoirit-kujkulhluu-t/) _Previous Weekly Posts_ [](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jjoirit-kujkulhluu-i/)
### [Unhinged](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jjoirit-kujkulhluu-d/)
The Left seems to be coming unhinged. So many have apparently been afflicted with Trump derangement syndrome, that a lot of them will say just about anything. This has been going on since President Trump was elected, but it seems to be getting worse. This week I'm looking at just the latest examples in my blog. Click below to read more. [Read this entry >>](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jjoirit-kujkulhluu-h/) [](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jjoirit-kujkulhluu-k/)
### [America First?](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jjoirit-kujkulhluu-u/)
There are basically two schools of thought on whether President Trump's "America First" strategy is the way to go. I'm discussing both in my blog this week and giving you my opinion on the strategy. Click below to read more. [Read this entry >>](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jjoirit-kujkulhluu-o/) [](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jjoirit-kujkulhluu-b/)
### [Here's My Advice to President Trump on North Korea (for what it's worth)](http://start.rightmailer.net/t/r-l-jjoirit-kujkulhluu-n/)
For the last year and a half or so, President Trump's critics have been warning that he was going to trigger World War III by his overly aggressive tactics towards North Korea. Then, surprising nearly everyone, President Trump and Kim Jong Un agreed to meet this week. So I'm blogging this week on my thoughts about where they go from here. Click below to read more. name: Jeremy Ring
subject: Standing with our educators
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR AND APPROVED BY JEREMY RING, DEMOCRAT, FOR CHIEF FINANCIAL OFFICER
body:
| [](https://act.myngp.com/el/uUEvH53aInOoYvfu6p-oeNnOJEnvs0gmhuKvwC9FVQ0=/8dbQW9gIKtl9yP23jcaLHX4c31yRkVSK2sjuNgiZkBw=) Friends and Neighbors -- Recently, our campaign had the honor of receiving the endorsement of **The Florida Education Association (FEA) to to become Florida 's Chief Financial Officer (CFO)**. I am proud to stand with groups like the FEA, to make sure our state does right by our wonderful educators, to recognize and reward them for their hard and tireless work, providing our children with the most important of services: a quality education that will help to build the bridge to their promising futures. So I was very disappointed when, **[just this Spring, our Legislature passed the education omnibus HB 7055, which makes it easier to decertify teacher labor organizations - like the FEA. ](https://act.myngp.com/el/uUEvH53aInOoYvfu6p-oeNnOJEnvs0gmhuKvwC9FVQ0=/gO_gVgO6z6LcipN_p_1KyccY32p6hSAcEv2wwd9FaNE=)** It's both astonishing and disgusting that in the same week that teachers threw their bodies over children to protect them from harm, the legislature voted to take away their ability to collectively negotiate their salaries. It's callous, it's nothing more than politics - **and it 's just plain wrong.** [](https://act.myngp.com/el/uUEvH53aInOoYvfu6p-oeNnOJEnvs0gmhuKvwC9FVQ0=/t45pqKe9mW9vbvVAIm6gs5uMtlpVg8na7JP3TF1JuhE=?am=20.18&recipientId=EsCT1N2SCLZJkIJRRTPlB2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&) [Help Jeremy Help Our Educators. Chip in $20.18.](https://act.myngp.com/el/uUEvH53aInOoYvfu6p-oeNnOJEnvs0gmhuKvwC9FVQ0=/t45pqKe9mW9vbvVAIm6gs5uMtlpVg8na7JP3TF1JuhE=?am=20.18&recipientId=EsCT1N2SCLZJkIJRRTPlB2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&) I fought hard for the pensions of educators and their ability to collectively negotiate during my time in the State Legislature. Where does CFO Patronis stand in his support of Florida's teachers? Well if his past -- and his no show to even meet with teachers and school employees for their endorsement -- tell us anything, **it 's not with our teachers.** As your next CFO, standing up for our great teachers, their right to collectively bargain, to make a decent living and to build up a healthy retirement, will be a top priority. I will support their right to push back legally against adverse actions like HB 7055 and will support legislation that helps our educators instead of holding them back. But I have an election to win first. **And I can 't do it without your help.** [**Can you contribute $20.18 or more today to help me help our great educators -- and our children -- in the cabinet?**](https://act.myngp.com/el/uUEvH53aInOoYvfu6p-oeNnOJEnvs0gmhuKvwC9FVQ0=/t45pqKe9mW9vbvVAIm6gs5uMtlpVg8na7JP3TF1JuhE=?am=20.18&recipientId=EsCT1N2SCLZJkIJRRTPlB2&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&) Thank you for all of your support, **Jeremy Ring** | POLITICAL ADVERTISEMENT PAID FOR AND APPROVED BY JEREMY RING, DEMOCRAT, FOR CHIEF FINANCIAL OFFICER

name: The White House
subject: A look inside Fourth of July at the White House
body:
Your 1600 Daily:
| | [](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=11d6861ec0fc0ecda3f1579257f8eb0a3778d8f609eb775ee20dfd688f4ec28842c4475e7bf0f5f773e7cb076906bdf8db89b882a30f891d) The White House • July 5, 2018
## The Day Ahead
Vice President Mike Pence will hold meetings with USAID Administrator Mark Green and President-elect of Colombia Ivan Duque at the White House. |
---
|

## A look inside Fourth of July at the White House
**On July 4, 1776** , the Second Continental Congress adopted Thomas Jefferson's Declaration of Independence. A quarter-century later, in 1801, President Jefferson would host the White House's first Fourth of July celebration. Modern Presidents have continued his tradition.
**Yesterday, President Donald J. Trump and the First Lady** welcomed military families and other guests to the White House South Lawn for music, food, and a front-row seat to the stunning fireworks display over our Nation's capital. "The immortal story of the American warrior is written in the fields of Gettysburg, the sands of Iwo Jima, the mountains of Afghanistan, and the snow of Valley Forge," President Trump said.
**The President was in West Virginia Tuesday night** for another celebration of our troops, a Salute to Service Dinner in White Sulphur Springs. "For 242 years--it's a long time--American independence has endured because of the sweat, blood, and sacrifice of the American armed forces," President Trump said. "It's the greatest force for peace and justice in the history of the world."
[Watch President Trump's Fourth of July message to Americans. ](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=11d6861ec0fc0ecd148b9cce379524f2eb157accdcf2be5b93a406e8591ae66a36727e2bb9751d129b698ee1d211c4d67463cff67f59f152)
**In photos** : [An inside look at Independence Day at the White House](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=11d6861ec0fc0ecd7615a268271487671686b39f722bd3b76c16e07453e6b1ae214e676fb2eb55c766547abfa6aac7b45d05aceb5eeda706)

---
|

## An economy that works for everyone
**Last week** , the Administration celebrated the six-month anniversary of President Trump signing sweeping tax cuts into law. On Tuesday, Treasury Secretary Steven Mnuchin explained why tax reform has been central to America's economic resurgence.
**"When I traveled with the President** during the campaign, we met with many people who explained that the economy was not working for them," Secretary Mnuchin writes. "The tax cuts' positive results for the American people are here. Many provisions that have improved business competitiveness are permanent, including lower corporate rates . . . Substantial economic progress and greater prosperity are already being achieved."
[How President Trump's tax cuts have strengthened the U.S. economy](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=11d6861ec0fc0ecda13d664c3e8da7c638a09638d9433b288fd57a339bfb50a238c129a9f8527ebfe261928fea8d4383c4b9238958b8b418)

---
|

## Photo of the Day
Official White House Photo by Shealah Craighead
**President Donald J. Trump and First Lady Melania Trump watch 4th of July fireworks from the Truman Balcony** | July 4, 2018

[Privacy Policy](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=11d6861ec0fc0ecd4fdab8febb6c466d14d3cd716f9e0679f60b1ee194ad19e84264ea2c207b2f3dea056bf7c7b1f343f2bca7eca4809125) | [Contact the White House](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=11d6861ec0fc0ecdfc301e4364542c979a864d92f72d2fc42e458e0a99c5c312e9946e4dba9935dbe375e06b8721bbfe3b33ee208a339595) | [Unsubscribe](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/unsub_center.aspx?qs=d453c42a6560d1d4925efe095db48d0de7ccaec6c4eb8db4d3a8adc6c2665b6b0d3717e6a8fd72767cc721eb31f9d3dfa1632825b441c0bfce79b6c7cecbbb3f)
---

It was October 5, 2015 and we had no idea what to expect. Would people support then-Governor Maggie Hassan's U.S. Senate campaign? If they did, would it be enough? Could we unseat a darling of the far-right? Could we really win?

Peter,

Voter disenfranchisement. Civil rights abuses. Physical assault. Even the suggestion that slavery should be allowed.

These are some of the things our candidates' Republican opponents have ACTUALLY advocated for or done.

With opponents like these, the stakes couldn't be higher for our women or their communities. We have to win.

**[Donate $3 to help elect pro-choice Democratic women running against Republicans with terrible track records.](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c4210/24c69fd9/18b96bddb/18833a6f/388819626/VEsE/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20180705_email_GOPRoundUp?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=2+-+Donate+3+to+help+elect+prochoice+Democra&utm_campaign=WQEFES08N_digital_email_20180705_GOPRoundup_inact&source=WQEFES08N_digital_email_20180705_GOPRoundup_inact")**

As Kansas' secretary of state, Kris Kobach -- now running for governor of Kansas -- supported a law suppressing the vote by requiring proof of citizenship. He also headed President Trump's bogus voter fraud commission and has been described as the "next Trump."

While he was sheriff of Maricopa County, Joe Arpaio -- who's running for the Senate in Arizona -- committed gross civil rights abuses, including racial profiling; was convicted of criminal contempt of court; and was subsequently pardoned by President Trump.

Then there's Montana Rep. Greg Gianforte, who was found guilty of having physically assaulted a reporter the night before he was elected.

And Minnesota Rep. Jason Lewis, a former conservative radio show host, said the government shouldn't tell people _they can't own slaves_.

It's horrifying, Peter.

But that's why we've endorsed Laura Kelly (KS-Gov), Kyrsten Sinema (AZ-Sen), Kathleen Williams (MT-AL) and Angie Craig (MN-02) -- because we know they can defeat these Republicans in November.

name: Peter Joffrion for Congress
subject: Weekly Update - July 5
body:
**Q2 Goal Reached!**
We asked, and supporters like you came through in a big way! We’re delighted to announce that the campaign reached its fundraising goal for Q2. Q3 is now underway, and it will take every dollar we can raise to flip this Congressional seat in November. You know what we’re up against. If you haven’t already given, now is the time to support our campaign with [your best donation](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/1575346/8450458/-1042528460?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTA3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZGU5ZWE5Yy05MjgwLWU4MTEtODBjMi0wMDBkM2ExMmIyYjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WcJzhyFyknYFvJj_YixtU5T1k0YmNDZthm_C6wZctu0=&emci=d5c09b88-9080-e811-80c2-000d3a12b2b9&emdi=7de9ea9c-9280-e811-80c2-000d3a12b2b9&ceid=6984379&am=25&smartlinkdata=JmVtPWRwd2lsbGlzNjclNDBnbWFpbC5jb20%3D&tknfa=cOiuoNRnA5SkajgobXBRhSqFXpFXmjwpQOGaDgKOuBo%3D). Help us send a strong voice for North Alabama to Congress!

**Campaigning with Peter**
Peter has been busy! The Huntsville garden tour was a great success. Thanks to everyone who attended or volunteered! The campaign had a strong presence at the Families Belong Together event in Huntsville’s Big Spring Park, which proceeded in spite of some [tense moments with an armed heckler](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/1575347/8450459/73281759?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTA3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZGU5ZWE5Yy05MjgwLWU4MTEtODBjMi0wMDBkM2ExMmIyYjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WcJzhyFyknYFvJj_YixtU5T1k0YmNDZthm_C6wZctu0=&utm_term=.8aa4e7ec30b2). This week, Peter has been out in the district meeting and listening to voters in Morgan County. He spent several hours at The Spirit of America Festival in Decatur on the Fourth of July. Special thanks to the Morgan County Democrats for their support on a sweltering holiday afternoon!

**Volunteers and Events**
It took dozens of volunteers to make the garden tour a success, but as campaign season moves forward we need all hands on deck. You can volunteer today to canvass, phone bank, write postcards at HQ, help with events, or work a shift at our front desk. We have tasks for all kinds of talents! We especially need canvassers, phone bankers, and event support. You can sign up to [volunteer online](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/1575348/8450460/-125016395?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMDEvMS82MTA3NyIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3ZGU5ZWE5Yy05MjgwLWU4MTEtODBjMi0wMDBkM2ExMmIyYjkiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=WcJzhyFyknYFvJj_YixtU5T1k0YmNDZthm_C6wZctu0=) or visit our Huntsville HQ at 303 Williams Ave. Suite 211 (the old Doug Jones office).

**Volunteer of the Week**
Meet our new campaign intern and volunteer of the week, Love Lundy! [Pitch in to the GOP Accountability Fund and help Joe BEAT extreme Republican Rep. Mike Braun >>](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c2ef3/7377f838/3d21d8b6/51f9c574/1953854259/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-gopbuy?refcode=20180705.1nd&amount=10")**

We’ve received a number of significant endorsements recently, so keep an eye out as we’ll be rolling them out next week! **One of the biggest endorsements we could get is from Democracy for America.** DFA is one of the largest progressive organizations in the country—over a million members strong—and their endorsement would be a huge boost to our campaign! subject: Act now: Save health care for Americans with pre-existing conditions
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
We can't let Jeff Sessions get away with this.

| [](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc4bcc4/c1f7015/6bab9b1f/11421b2a/3773088286/VEsH/ "http://www.grassrootsact.com/preexistingconditions?utm_source=tinasmith&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=akpreexisting") Friend, I wanted to reach out because once again Republicans are threatening to dismantle health care reform and allow insurance companies to refuse coverage to Americans with pre-existing conditions. **The Justice Department, led by Attorney General Jeff Sessions, is arguing that the law that makes insurance companies cover people who have a pre-existing medical condition is unconstitutional.** This is unacceptable and dangerous -- that's why we have to act now. And the only way to stop them is to create enough public pressure that they back down. [**That 's why I'm asking you to join me and progressive fighters from across the country and sign this petition. Tell the Justice Department to stop the politics and defend these critical protections now.**](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc4bcc4/c1f7015/6bab9b1f/11421b2a/3773088286/VEsE/ "http://www.grassrootsact.com/preexistingconditions?utm_source=tinasmith&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=akpreexisting") We don't know what the Supreme Court will look like in the coming months, so it's more important than ever that we stop this attack on health care in its tracks. name: Scott Pruitt Update (via Team O'Halleran)
subject: FINALLY
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tom O'Halleran for Congress
body:
It took months of good-government advocates like Tom, and concerned citizens like you, calling for it, but it finally happened...
[](http://action.tomohalleran.com/page/m/1d6338c5/1a8421e1/1a482a3e2/4bf3e6c0/120641660/VEsH/ "http://www.tomohalleran.com")
---
Friend, It took months of good-government advocates like Tom, and concerned citizens like you, calling for it, but it FINALLY happened... _**SCOTT PRUITT -- the Trump Administration 's corrupt chief of the Environmental Protection Agency -- has resigned!**_ It took too long -- but Pruitt's resignation is proof that we can hold our government to higher standards if Americans insist on it. **[And with your help, we'll keep doing it. Consider making a donation today to re-elect Tom, who was on the frontlines in Congress calling for Pruitt to step down >>](http://action.tomohalleran. "http://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/ohalleranq32018?refcode=em_fr_2018.07.05_b1_to_all&recurring=auto&amount=10&amounts=10,25,50,100,250,500,1000&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&city=Glendale&state=AZ&zip=85307&phone=&occupation=&employer=")** Friend, we mean it when we say that Pruitt would not have stepped down without sustained public pressure. Remember, even as accusations of improper behavior were piling up around him -- Pruitt stayed in office. FOR MONTHS! _Let 's review. Pruitt allegedly:_
* Outfitted his office with a $43,000 soundproof phone booth
* Spent taxpayer dollars on exorbitant travel expenses
* Rented a D.C. lobbyist's condo for $50 a night
* Asked government staff to find his wife a job with a six-figure salary and _help her secure her own Chick-Fil-A franchise_

_And that 's just a sampling!_ Friends, let's be clear: We need to make sure Congress keeps up the pressure on this Administration to prevent even more future abuses. **[Thankfully, there are few issues Tom cares about more than keeping our government accountable to you -- so please consider supporting his re-election campaign today.](http://action.tomohalleran.
